title: On Target Escape
description: Adds a trigger to call when this entity loses the target it currently has.

event.title: Event
event.description:
The event to run when the conditions for this trigger are met.

Sample values:
• llama: minecraft:on_calm
• magma_cube: minecraft:become_calm

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
The list of conditions for this trigger to execute.

Sample values:
• llama: {"all_of":[{"test":"is_family","subject":"targe...

target.title: Target
target.description:
The target of the event.

Sample values:
• dolphin: self
